name: Appetizer Strudel
recipeIngredient: Freshly grated Parmesan cheese -- for topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring filo dough to room temperature; do not unwrap.
2. Prepare filling and set aside.
3. Have butter ready.
4. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Butter a baking sheet.
6. Place a large tea towel on a flat work surface.
7. Unwrap filo dough and lay it flat.
8. Lay one filo sheet with a long side facing you; keep other sheets covered with waxed paper topped with a dampened tea towel to prevent drying.
9. Brush the first filo sheet with butter, then place a second sheet on top of the first and brush with butter.
10. Spread filling over buttered filo sheets, leaving a 3-inch border uncovered on the long side farthest from you.
11. Fold the side nearest you over the filling.
12. Lift the tea towel and roll up the dough, encasing the filling; pinch seam edges together to seal.
13. Place the roll, seam side down, on the prepared baking sheet and flatten slightly with your palm.
14. Cut slits through top pastry layers at intervals of about 1/2 inch; do not cut all the way through.
15. Brush the top with egg white.
16. Bake until golden (25-30 minutes). Remove from oven and finish cutting through slits to form slices.
